caption: A young boy in a red shirt and blue pants is sitting on a wooden surface, looking down at a bleeding scrape on his knee.
A person wearing white gloves is applying pressure to a severe, bleeding wound on the thigh of another person lying on the ground outdoors.
A close-up of a knee with a fresh, bleeding wound and surrounding bruising.
A medical professional wearing a blue surgical cap, face mask, and gloves holds up a test tube containing a red liquid, likely blood, with a blurred background.
A close-up of a raw, bleeding wound on human skin, with surrounding tissue appearing irritated and slightly swollen.
The image displays twelve red fingerprint impressions arranged in three rows of four on a white background.
An elderly person is gently wiping their nose with a white cloth that has red stains on it.
A hand holding a pen is signing a contract titled "CONTRACT" on a wooden table, with red splatters resembling blood and two lit candles nearby.
A person wearing blue gloves is applying a white cream from a tube onto a red irritated patch of skin.
A person wearing blue medical gloves is applying a white cream from a tube onto a red, irritated skin area on a patient's torso.
A close-up of a person's upper arm showing a small, red, irritated scratch or cut near the shoulder.
A person's leg with a fresh cut near the knee, from which blood is dripping down the thigh, set against a background of green grass.
A person with messy hair, smeared with blood, grimaces with their mouth open and hand pressed against their cheek, eyes wide and looking to the side.
A person is pointing at a fresh, bloody wound on their knee, with a tennis racket partially visible in the background.
A close-up of a person's leg shows a mosquito perched on a fresh, bleeding puncture wound.
A close-up of a hand with a small, fresh cut on the palm, showing a drop of blood.
A close-up of a person's bare foot showing a fresh cut on the ankle with blood flowing from the wound.

A black revolver with a wooden grip and textured pattern rests on a wooden surface.
A silver revolver with a textured grip rests on a wooden surface, its cylinder partially open and revealing the chambers.
